name: Italian Love Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cake according to the box instructions.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased and floured 9 x 13 pan.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, sugar, eggs, and vanilla. Mix well.
4. Spoon the ricotta mixture over the top of the unbaked cake.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
6. Allow to cool completely.
7. In a separate bowl, mix the chocolate pudding with milk until combined.
8. Gently fold in the whipped cream.
9. Spread the pudding mixture over the cooled cake.
10. Refrigerate the cake until serving.
